intro: Alsinopsis occidentalis, also known as Western Yarrow, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include reducing fever, inflammation, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable asset in treating various health conditions. The bioactive constituents of Alsinopsis occidentalis include flavonoids, sesquiterpenes, and volatile oils, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
